subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached the presence of the Wronged One, and We have understood that which was contained therein, and have answered thee with that which draweth those who believe in divine unity unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک لدی المظلوم و عرفنا ما فیه و اجبناک بما ینجذب به الموحدون الی
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
